all.en: Every Friday night, the Chen family gathers around the dining table for a special meal.
all.zh: 每個星期五晚上，陳家人都會圍著餐桌享用一頓特別的晚餐。

all.en: Mom serves steaming bowls of beef noodle soup while Dad pours tea for everyone.
all.zh: 媽媽端上熱騰騰的牛肉麵湯，爸爸則為大家倒茶。

all.en: "So, who wants to share their week first?" Dad asks with a warm smile.
all.zh: 「那麼，誰想先分享這週的事？」爸爸帶著溫暖的微笑問道。

all.en: Emily, the eldest, announces that she finally got promoted to assistant manager at her office.
all.zh: 大女兒艾蜜莉宣布她終於在公司升為助理經理了。

all.en: Everyone cheers and her younger brother Kevin gives her a playful high-five.
all.zh: 大家歡呼起來，弟弟凱文還跟她俏皮地擊了個掌。

all.en: Kevin then complains about his math teacher, who assigned three chapters of homework over the weekend.
all.zh: 接著凱文抱怨他的數學老師，週末出了三章的作業。

all.en: Mom laughs and reminds him that complaining won't make the homework disappear.
all.zh: 媽媽笑著提醒他，抱怨並不會讓作業消失。

all.en: Grandma, sitting at the head of the table, shares that she joined a senior dance class on Wednesday.
all.zh: 坐在主位的奶奶分享說她週三加入了一個長青舞蹈班。

all.en: "At seventy-two, I can still move my hips," she says proudly, making everyone laugh.
all.zh: 「七十二歲了，我的腰還是能扭呢，」她得意地說，惹得大家哈哈大笑。

all.en: Dad mentions that his company is sending him to Tokyo for a conference next month.
all.zh: 爸爸提到下個月公司要派他去東京參加會議。

all.en: By the end of dinner, everyone feels closer, knowing what's happening in each other's lives.
all.zh: 晚餐結束時，大家都感到更親近了，因為了解了彼此的近況。

all.en: Emily volunteers to do the dishes, and Kevin actually offers to help dry them.
all.zh: 艾蜜莉自願洗碗，凱文居然也主動幫忙擦乾。

all.en: After the dishes were done, the family moved to the living room to watch a movie together.
all.zh: 碗洗好後，全家移到客廳一起看電影。

all.en: Kevin let Grandma choose this week, so they ended up with an old black-and-white classic.
all.zh: 凱文讓奶奶這週挑片，結果他們選了一部老的黑白經典電影。

all.en: Grandma explained the story to Kevin, who pretended to be bored but secretly enjoyed it.
all.zh: 奶奶向凱文解釋劇情，他假裝無聊，但其實偷偷看得很投入。

all.en: Emily curled up on the couch with a blanket and slowly fell asleep during the second hour.
all.zh: 艾蜜莉裹著毯子蜷在沙發上，看到第二個小時就慢慢睡著了。

all.en: Dad brought out a tray of sliced fruit and tea cups for everyone.
all.zh: 爸爸端出一盤切好的水果和茶杯給大家。

all.en: Mom whispered to Dad that she felt grateful these Friday nights still happened every week.
all.zh: 媽媽悄悄對爸爸說，她很感激這些週五夜晚每週都還能繼續。

all.en: Kevin asked Grandma to teach him a few dance steps from her senior class.
all.zh: 凱文央求奶奶教他幾個老人舞蹈班學的舞步。

all.en: Grandma laughed and pulled him up, demonstrating a slow waltz right in the living room.
all.zh: 奶奶笑著把他拉起來，當場在客廳示範了一段慢華爾滋。

all.en: Before going to bed, Emily reminded everyone that next Friday she would cook for the family.
all.zh: 睡前，艾蜜莉提醒大家下週五輪到她下廚。

all.en: Dad turned off the lights and smiled, thinking how lucky he was to have such a warm family.
all.zh: 爸爸關了燈，微笑著想著自己擁有這麼溫暖的家庭真是幸運。

all.en: The next Friday came quickly, and Emily started cooking right after she got home from work.
all.zh: 下個星期五很快就到了，艾蜜莉一下班回家就開始下廚。

all.en: She had chosen to make a Japanese-style curry with chicken, carrots, and soft boiled potatoes.
all.zh: 她決定煮日式咖哩，加了雞肉、紅蘿蔔和燉得鬆軟的馬鈴薯。

all.en: Kevin walked into the kitchen and offered to chop the onions, claiming his eyes never watered.
all.zh: 凱文走進廚房，自願切洋蔥，宣稱自己的眼睛從來不會流淚。

all.en: Within minutes, he was wiping tears with his sleeve, and Grandma laughed from the doorway.
all.zh: 沒過幾分鐘，他就用袖子擦眼淚了，奶奶在門口看了哈哈大笑。

all.en: Dad set the table carefully and lit a small candle in the center for a cozy feeling.
all.zh: 爸爸細心地擺好餐具，並在桌子中央點了一根小蠟燭，營造溫馨的氣氛。

all.en: Mom poured fruit juice for the children and a glass of red wine for the adults.
all.zh: 媽媽為孩子們倒了果汁，給大人倒了一杯紅酒。

all.en: Emily proudly served the curry and waited nervously for everyone's first reaction.
all.zh: 艾蜜莉得意地端上咖哩，緊張地等著大家第一口的反應。

all.en: Grandma took a careful bite and declared that the flavor reminded her of a trip to Osaka.
all.zh: 奶奶仔細嚐了一口，宣布這味道讓她想起一趟大阪之旅。

all.en: Everyone agreed that Emily had truly stepped up and earned the title of family chef this week.
all.zh: 大家一致同意艾蜜莉這週確實表現出色，當之無愧贏得家庭主廚的頭銜。

all.en: That night, Mom started a notebook to record every Friday meal so they would never forget any.
all.zh: 那晚，媽媽開始準備一本筆記本，記下每個週五的菜色，這樣就不會忘記任何一道。

all.en: By the following Friday, Mom had already filled three pages of her new family dinner notebook.
all.zh: 到了下個星期五，媽媽已經在新的家庭晚餐筆記本上寫了三頁。

all.en: Grandma offered to cook this week and announced she would prepare her famous braised pork rice.
all.zh: 奶奶這週主動表示要下廚，並宣布要準備她的招牌滷肉飯。

all.en: Kevin set the table while Emily helped Grandma chop ginger and green onions in the kitchen.
all.zh: 凱文擺餐具，艾蜜莉則在廚房幫奶奶切薑和蔥。

all.en: Dad opened a bottle of plum wine that he had been saving for a special weekend occasion.
all.zh: 爸爸開了一瓶他特地留著等週末特別場合喝的梅酒。

all.en: The aroma of slow-cooked pork filled every corner of the house and even drifted into the garden.
all.zh: 慢燉豬肉的香味飄滿了家裡每個角落，甚至飄進了花園。

all.en: Grandma told stories of cooking the same dish for Dad when he was just a little boy.
all.zh: 奶奶分享起她當年為還是小男孩的爸爸煮這道菜的故事。

all.en: Kevin asked if he could learn to make the dish himself, surprising the entire family at the table.
all.zh: 凱文問他能不能學著做這道菜，讓全家人都在餐桌前驚訝不已。

all.en: Emily proudly recorded the recipe in Mom's notebook with neat handwriting and a small drawing.
all.zh: 艾蜜莉得意地用工整的字跡和一張小插圖把食譜記在媽媽的筆記本裡。

all.en: After dinner, Dad shared photos from his recent business trip and described the streets of Tokyo.
all.zh: 晚餐後，爸爸分享他最近出差的照片，描述了東京的街道。

all.en: Before bed, Mom whispered that this Friday tradition was now her favorite part of every week.
all.zh: 睡前，媽媽悄悄說這個星期五的傳統如今是她每週最喜歡的時光。

all.en: Kevin spent the next Friday preparing simple grilled fish under Grandma's careful guidance.
all.zh: 凱文下個星期五在奶奶細心指導下，準備了簡單的烤魚。

all.en: Emily quietly recorded each cooking step in Mom's notebook so the family could remember it later.
all.zh: 艾蜜莉默默把每個烹飪步驟記在媽媽的筆記本裡，方便家人日後翻閱。

all.en: Dad opened a bottle of light white wine that paired perfectly with the gentle flavors of the dish.
all.zh: 爸爸開了一瓶清爽的白酒，搭配這道清淡口味的菜肴恰到好處。

all.en: Mom complimented Kevin so warmly that his cheeks turned bright pink at the dinner table.
all.zh: 媽媽溫暖地稱讚凱文，他坐在餐桌前臉頰都紅得發燙了。

all.en: Grandma added a small note in the notebook about her late husband's favorite seasoning trick.
all.zh: 奶奶在筆記本裡加了一段小註記，寫下她已故先生最愛用的調味小技巧。

all.en: After dinner, the family looked through old travel photos that Dad had brought back from Tokyo.
all.zh: 晚餐後，全家一起翻看爸爸從東京帶回來的舊旅遊照片。

all.en: Emily suggested they begin saving for a future family trip to Japan during the summer holiday.
all.zh: 艾蜜莉提議大家開始存錢，未來暑假可以全家一起去日本旅遊。

all.en: Kevin enthusiastically agreed and immediately offered to contribute part of his allowance every week.
all.zh: 凱文興奮地同意，當場主動表示要每週貢獻一部分零用錢。

all.en: Grandma promised to teach the family a few basic Japanese phrases before they ever boarded the plane.
all.zh: 奶奶答應在他們上飛機前，會教全家幾句基本的日語會話。

all.en: That night, Mom closed her notebook gently, knowing it now held the heart of their weekly tradition.
all.zh: 那晚，媽媽輕輕闔上筆記本，心知這本本子如今承載了他們每週傳統的核心。
